# Database Specialist Review

**Date:** 2026-03-01
**Reviewer:** @data-engineer (Dara)

---

## Gate Status: N/A

**paybot-sdk has no database layer.** This is a client SDK that communicates with an external PayBot facilitator API over HTTP.

### Observations
- No Supabase, PostgreSQL, or any database configuration
- No schema files, migrations, or ORM usage
- Data persistence is handled server-side by the facilitator

### Recommendation
No database-related technical debt exists. Skip database remediation in the resolution plan.
